concerns.text: The plan states a performance goal to process ≥ 10 000 URLs within 6 hours on the default GitHub Actions runner (2 vCPUs, ~7 GB RAM). Given the need to download, parse, and statistically reconstruct each page, this throughput is likely infeasible without exceeding the runner’s time or memory limits, especially considering network latency and HTML variability. Either reduce the target corpus size, increase parallelism beyond the runner’s capacity, or provide evidence (e.g., benchmark results) that the pipeline can meet this deadline under the specified constraints.
